_meta.note: Authoritative JS8 channel-symbol (itone) assembly for the fixed 87-bit msgbits (same as js8_ldpc.json). 'itone_orig' uses NCOSTAS=1 (original Costas, JS8 Normal); 'itone_sym' uses NCOSTAS=2 (three symmetrical Costas, Fast/Turbo/Slow/Ultra). 79 tones 0-7: S7 D29 S7 D29 S7, data via plain-binary 3-bit map. Pure Fortran (reference encode174 + genjs8 tone loop; no CRC).
